div.head: The Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, March 3, 1942—4 p.m.
[Received 6:51 p.m.]

div.p: 669. Department’s airmail instruction 2243, February 24 and telegram 525 March 2, midnight.Neither printed. The Minister of Communications informed the Embassy that he would issue instructions today closing all radio-telephone and radio-telegraph communication between Brazil and the Axis nations et cetera, in compliance with Resolution XL of the Rio de Janeiro Conference.For correspondence on the Third Meeting of the Foreign Ministers of the American Republics at Rio de Janeiro, see pp. 6 ff.; for text of Resolution XL, see Department of State Bulletin, February 7, 1942, p. 140.
